Name: Jasper SAM Events
Description: General-purpose Samurai event profile for PvE. Broken references and field-content-specific events were removed for stable roulette and raid use.

Events.Name: Hagakure OOC
Events.Description: Uses Hagakure between pulls when out of combat and Sen conditions are met.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Samurai ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Feint TB
Events.Description: Uses Feint for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Samurai ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Logics.Name: Feint TB
Logics.Description: Uses Feint for incoming tankbusters when the target is not already debuffed.
